name: umbraculum-node-react-cursor-assistant
description: Node/TypeScript/React/E2E Cursor assistant: rules, skills, and agents. Generic; suitable for any TS/JS project (the umbraculum- brand prefix is for marketplace name-uniqueness, not because the plugin is umbraculum-specific). Install alongside umbraculum-toolset-common for the language-agnostic meta-framework rules and the generate-development-local skill.
